problem: What material stores hydrogen fuel at high density without safety risk?
mechanism: Biomimetic surface structure (lotus, shark skin, gecko)
hypothesis: If Biomimetic surface structure (lotus, shark skin, gecko) is applied to without, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Prototype device testing with 30 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
